rules.title: Review evidence package is thin
rules.failureMessage: The review package has too few uploaded artifacts or extracted requirements to support a complete ARB assessment.
rules.recommendation: Upload HLD, SOW or requirements, architecture diagrams, IaC, operational runbooks, and governance evidence before board submission.

rules.title: Insufficient extracted evidence for full assessment
rules.failureMessage: The extracted evidence set is too small to fairly assess all ARB domains.
rules.recommendation: Provide additional evidence such as identity design, network topology, DR plan, monitoring plan, cost model, and IaC before final ARB sign-off.
